name: Origami Risk GRC API
what_it_does: Origami Risk REST API for integrated risk management platform covering GRC, insurance, claims, and safety. Enables AI agents to manage risk incidents, claims, policy data, safety observations, audit findings, and compliance workflows. Origami Risk serves insurance carriers, corporate risk managers, brokers, and third-party administrators with a configurable risk management platform.
use_cases: Managing risk incidents and claims from risk management automation agents
Processing safety observations and corrective actions from EHS agents
Integrating policy and coverage data from insurance risk agents
Querying risk analytics and loss data from risk intelligence agents
not_for: Simple help desk ticketing without risk management context
IT-only GRC without physical risk and insurance coverage
Consumer insurance without enterprise risk management requirements
best_when: An enterprise risk management, insurance, or safety team using Origami Risk wants AI agents to automate incident reporting, claims processing, and risk analytics integration.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Insurance claims and risk data is sensitive and regulated. Incorrect claims data manipulation has legal and financial consequences. FINANCIAL RISK applies for claims processing.

auth.notes: Origami Risk uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. Enterprise customer credentials via Origami Risk implementation team. No self-service API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise risk management pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts; pricing by module and user
pricing.notes: Private company. Enterprise risk management platform. Highly configurable — implementations vary significantly.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits per client

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Insurance claims and risk data — financial and legal consequences
No public MCP server — enterprise-only REST API
Highly configurable platform — data model varies significantly per client configuration
Limited public documentation — enterprise implementation team engagement required
Claims data processing requires regulatory compliance (state insurance regulations)
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Insurance claims and risk management data. SOC2. US-only. OAuth2. Enterprise-only with limited public docs. Claims data has regulatory implications.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance claims and risk data. SOC2. US-only. OAuth2. Enterprise-only. Claims data has regulatory implications.
